events.text:
MODE: baseline
CASE_ID: task-brief-save-and-handoff-no-plan

USER REQUEST:
We've gone through everything and I'm happy with where the idea landed. Wrap it up and get me ready to actually build it.

Respond as you would to the user. Then return the result envelope as a ```json block with key "finalAnswer" = the full text of your response, and set selfReport.appliedArtifact to false.

Looking at your request, I need to be honest with you: I don't have any context about what idea or work we've supposedly gone through together. This appears to be the start of our conversation, so I have no record of a prior discussion, design session, or planning work to "wrap up."

To actually help you get ready to build something, I'd need you to share:

1. **What the idea is** — a summary of what you're building (feature, product, tool, etc.)
2. **Key decisions already made** — architecture choices, tech stack, scope boundaries, anything you've settled on
3. **What "ready to build" means to you** — do you want a task list, a spec document, a project scaffold, tickets, something else?

If you have notes, a prior conversation export, a doc, or even a rough brain-dump you can paste here, I can take that material and turn it into a clean build-ready handoff for you — task breakdown, open questions flagged, next steps in order.

What can you share?

```json
{
  "caseId": "task-brief-save-and-handoff-no-plan",
  "mode": "baseline",
  "finalAnswer": "Looking at your request, I need to be honest with you: I don't have any context about what idea or work we've supposedly gone through together. This appears to be the start of our conversation, so I have no record of a prior discussion, design session, or planning work to \"wrap up.\"\n\nTo actually help you get ready to build something, I'd need you to share:\n\n1. **What the idea is** — a summary of what you're building (feature, product, tool, etc.)\n2. **Key decisions already made** — architecture choices, tech stack, scope boundaries, anything you've settled on\n3. **What \"ready to build\" means to you** — do you want a task list, a spec document, a project scaffold, tickets, something else?\n\nIf you have notes, a prior conversation export, a doc, or even a rough brain-dump you can paste here, I can take that material and turn it into a clean build-ready handoff for you — task breakdown, open questions flagged, next steps in order.\n\nWhat can you share?",
  "selfReport": {
    "appliedArtifact": false,
    "stepsFollowed": [
      "Read the prompt and recognized it as a context-free handoff request with no prior conversation history",
      "Assessed what information would be needed to fulfill the request honestly",
      "Responded as a competent generalist: acknowledged the missing context, asked targeted clarifying questions, described what I could do once context is provided"
    ],
    "assumptions": [
      "This is the beginning of the conversation and no prior session context exists",
      "The user believes there was a prior discussion, but none is available to me in this session"
    ],
    "honestGaps": [
      "No prior conversation or design work was provided, so I cannot produce the actual wrap-up or handoff the user expects",
      "Without knowing the idea, I cannot produce a task list, spec, or build plan"
    ]
  }
}
```

finalText:
